headline: Klaviyo (KVYO) to Benefit From Persistent Scaling of Autonomous Engagement Solutions

headline: How The Intel (INTC) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Hopes And Execution Risks
summary: Intel’s latest update keeps its core fair value estimate steady at US$47.12, even as fresh research reports show a mix of higher and lower price targets across Wall Street. Some analysts are lifting their targets by mid single to low double digit dollar amounts on data center and AI optimism, while others are trimming them slightly on worries that expectations are running ahead of execution. As you read on, you will see how these competing views are shaping the evolving narrative around Intel...
